data.title: TEST: Form
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Beside Layout - Full Content","description":"Two-column layout with heading on the left (sticky) and form on the right. All ThemeHeading fields populated."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/form {"headingPosition":"beside","eyebrow":"Contact Us","heading":"Have Questions? Get in Touch!","description":"We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours. Whether you have questions about our services, need support, or want to explore partnership opportunities.","buttons":[{"title":"Learn More","url":"#","opensInNewTab":false}],"formId":"1"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Beside Layout - Minimal (Required Only)","description":"Only heading and form, no eyebrow, description, or buttons. Tests empty state handling with shouldDisplay()."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/form {"headingPosition":"beside","heading":"Contact Form","formId":"1"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Above Layout - Full Content","description":"Stacked centered layout with all fields populated. Max-width constrained."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/form {"headingPosition":"above","eyebrow":"Get Started","heading":"Ready to Transform Your Business?","description":"Complete the form below to schedule a free consultation with one of our experts. We will review your needs and provide a customized plan tailored to your goals.","buttons":[{"title":"View Our Services","url":"#","opensInNewTab":false},{"title":"Call Us","url":"tel:+1234567890","opensInNewTab":false}],"formId":"1"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Above Layout - Minimal","description":"Stacked layout with only heading, no optional fields. Tests centered alignment with minimal content."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/form {"headingPosition":"above","heading":"Subscribe","formId":"1"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content - Beside Layout","description":"Edge case: very long heading and description to test overflow, wrapping, and sticky behavior with excessive content."} -->
